name: Moneybird Accounting API
what_it_does: Dutch online accounting and invoicing platform with comprehensive REST API — handling invoices, estimates, contacts, time tracking, bank import, and VAT returns for Dutch and Belgian small businesses, with developer-friendly API for accounting automation.
use_cases: Creating and sending invoices to Dutch clients with automatic VAT calculation via API
Importing bank transactions and categorizing them via financial mutations API
Managing contacts (clients and suppliers) programmatically for CRM integration
Automating VAT return preparation by querying financial data via API
Time registration and billable hours tracking integration via time entries API
not_for: Non-Dutch/Belgian businesses — Moneybird is specifically built for NL/BE tax systems
Enterprise accounting with complex multi-entity consolidation
Teams needing multi-currency or international invoicing beyond EUR
best_when: A Dutch or Belgian freelancer, agency, or small business needs a well-documented accounting API for automation, with native VAT and Dutch tax compliance.
avoid_when: You operate outside the Netherlands or Belgium, need multi-currency, or require enterprise ERP features.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code flow for third-party apps. Personal access tokens for direct API use. Administration ID required in all API paths. Scoped access (read, write) per resource type. Separate app registration required for OAuth2.

pricing.notes: No free tier. Dutch company (Enschede). Netherlands and Belgium focused. Very developer-friendly API with comprehensive documentation in English and Dutch. Standard pricing for Dutch market. Used by thousands of Dutch freelancers and SMBs.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; contact support for specifics

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Excellent REST API documentation in English. Covers all accounting entities: contacts, invoices, estimates, receipts, bank transactions, tax rates. OAuth2 for partner apps. Webhook support. Administration ID in URL is consistent pattern. Very agent-friendly API design.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Invoice creation creates new records. Contact creation idempotent by custom_id or email. Financial mutation import has duplicate detection. Resource updates idempotent for same values.
known_agent_gotchas: Administration ID must be in every API URL — fetch from /api/v2/administrations first
OAuth2 required for multi-user apps — personal token only for single-user automation
Dutch VAT tax periods and rules — requires Dutch accounting knowledge for correct use
Bank import via API requires reconciliation — automatic matching not always accurate

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Dutch company with EU data residency. OAuth2 with resource scopes. Personal tokens for direct use. Financial data encrypted at rest. No formal ISO/SOC2 certifications but GDPR-compliant. Strong Dutch privacy standards.
